account.title: Account | 360Ghar
account.signInDesc: Sign in to view saved properties, manage your profile, and continue your property search.

mcp.title: Connect AI Assistant | 360Ghar
mcp.description: Securely connect your 360Ghar account to an AI assistant.
mcp.linkRequiredDesc: Open this page from a valid AI assistant connection flow to finish linking your 360Ghar account.
mcp.signInToConnectDesc: Sign in with your phone number and password to securely connect your 360Ghar account to your AI assistant. You can revoke access at any time by logging out or rotating your token.
mcp.consent: By continuing, you allow 360Ghar tools to access your saved properties, swipes, and visits so the AI assistant can personalize recommendations for you.
mcp.invalidRedirectDesc: The redirect URI provided is not authorized. Please open this page from a valid AI assistant connection flow.

deletion.title: Account Deletion Request | 360Ghar
deletion.description: Request deletion of your account or data.
deletion.heading: Account & Data Deletion
deletion.description2: Request deletion of your account or personal data from our platform. We take privacy seriously and will process your request promptly.
deletion.deleteWhat: What would you like to delete?
deletion.fullAccountDesc: Delete my entire account and all associated data
deletion.personalOnlyDesc: Delete only my personal information while keeping account
deletion.propertiesOnlyDesc: Delete only my property listings and related data
deletion.specificDataDesc: Delete specific data (please specify in details below)
deletion.detailsPlaceholder: Please provide any additional information about your deletion request...
deletion.noticePermanentlyRemoved: All your data will be <0>permanently removed</0>
deletion.noticeLoseAccess: You will lose access to saved properties, messages, and account settings
deletion.noticeVerifyIdentity: We will verify your identity before processing the request
deletion.submitError: We could not submit your request. Please try again or contact support.
deletion.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us! We have received your account deletion request and will get back to you within 24 hours.
deletion.subject: Account Deletion Request

home.manageDesc: Manage your profile, saved listings, and visits from one place.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

details.updateDesc: Update your personal information associated with your account.

address.description: Your saved contact and address details.

changePassword.title: Password Change
changePassword.changeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password | 360Ghar
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.successMessage: Password reset link sent to your email!
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | 360Ghar
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your 360Ghar account.
resetPassword.heading: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successfully! Please login with your new password.
resetPassword.errorMessage: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

profileCompletion.title: Complete Your Profile | 360Ghar
profileCompletion.description: Please complete your profile to continue.
profileCompletion.heading: Complete Your Profile
profileCompletion.errorMessage: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

addPhone.title: Add Phone | 360Ghar
addPhone.description: Add and verify a phone number to your account.
addPhone.heading: Add your phone number
addPhone.subheading: Verify a phone number to secure your account and get visit updates. You can skip this for now.
addPhone.codeSent: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.
addPhone.sendFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.
addPhone.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
addPhone.skipConsequence: If you skip, you won't receive SMS notifications about visits, property updates, or account alerts.
